texto: But she always kept on until the end. She knew, as i knew, that you don't stop a story half done. You keep on going, through heartbreak and pain and fear, and times there is a happy ending, and times there isn't. Don't matter. You don't cut a flower half through and then wait and watch as it slowly shrivels to death. And you don't stop a story before you reach the end. - A Creature of Moonlight
explicacao: Citação de Rebecca Hahn sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “But she always kept on until the end. She knew, as i knew, that you don't stop a story half done.…” articula amor, stories, storytelling em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.
